## How I tested it

<!--
- Commands you ran (`npm run build`, `npm run lint`, `cargo test`, …)

## Checklist

- [ ] **I was assigned this issue before I started coding.** (PRs from unassigned contributors are closed — see CONTRIBUTING.md.)
- [ ] My branch is `feat/...` or `fix/...`, not `main`.
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes.
- [ ] `npm run build` passes.
- [ ] If I touched `contracts/`, `cargo test` passes.
- [ ] If this is a UI change, I've attached a screenshot or video.
- [ ] I've run the AI reviewer (`@greptile review` in a PR comment) and addressed every comment until **Confidence Score: 5/5** with **zero unresolved threads**. *(Do this AFTER opening the PR — the welcome comment will remind you.)*
